Re-everything Everything deserves to be reflected, reimagined, reinvented, reinterpreted, reviewed, revised, rethink-ed, reconnected, resonated, revolutionized, remixed, revealed, reframed, or rekindled.
& Some things never to be repeated.
About
Films Series
Archive

My Favorite Films

Here is a list of films I really enjoyed. The slashes (/) indicate the depth of my enjoyment or its meanifulness to my life.

Disclaimer: I started building this list in 2013, so many entries are quite outdated or reflect a more immature perspective. Evolving tastes, so to speak.

  • 007 (Daniel Craig) // (Eva Green, Lea Seydoux)
  • 21 Bridges
  • All the Money in the World
  • Bad Boys
  • Bastilles Day
